creator: john.c.prather@gmail.com
text:
This time it HAS to be right!  And next time I'm going to run things
through portlint/tinderbox instead of thinking my eyeballs and a brief
test build/run are capable of telling me that everything is in order.

davmail-390-391-2.txt - updates to 3.9.1, de-obfuscates rc script, and
fixes broken pkg-plist.
